title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
